positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos.tptp
1. ! [X0] : (sells_more_than_one_million(X0) => on_top_10(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. sells_more_than_one_million(legend_of_zelda) [input(axiom)]
3. on_top_10(legend_of_zelda) [input(conjecture)]
4. ~on_top_10(legend_of_zelda) [negated conjecture 3]
5. ~on_top_10(legend_of_zelda) [flattening 4]
6. ! [X0] : (on_top_10(X0) | ~sells_more_than_one_million(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
7. ~sells_more_than_one_million(X0) | on_top_10(X0) [cnf transformation 6]
8. sells_more_than_one_million(legend_of_zelda) [cnf transformation 2]
9. ~on_top_10(legend_of_zelda) [cnf transformation 5]
10. on_top_10(legend_of_zelda) [resolution 7,8]
11. $false [forward subsumption resolution 10,9]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
